title: Scrophularia grayana
taxonomy: Scrophularia grayana is classified within the plant family Scrophulariaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as figworts. The Scrophularia genus is a group of flowering plants native to the Northern Hemisphere, particularly in the mountainous regions. The Scrophularia grayana species is part of this genus, which is known for its medicinal properties and ornamental value. The family Scrophulariaceae is an ancient group of plants that has been present for millions of years, with some species dating back to the Cretaceous period. This classification places Scrophularia grayana within the broader context of flowering plants and provides insight into its evolutionary history.
